markdown:
#  View a Purchase Order 
#####  Legacy Content
This page details the legacy experience for the Project level Commitments tool.
If you want to view the details of a purchase order, you can view them from the Commitments tool. Which purchase orders you can see depends on the permissions that have been granted.
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * _To view purchase orders NOT marked Private_ , 'Read Only' level permissions or higher on the Commitments tool.
    * _To view a purchase order marked Private_ :
    * 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Commitments tool.   
OR 
    * 'Read Only' or 'Standard' level permissions on the project's Commitments tool and you must be a member of the 'Private' list on the purchase order.   
OR
    * 'Read Only' or 'Standard' level permissions on the project's Commitments tool with the ['View Private Purchase Order Contract' granular permission](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/permissions-company/tutorials/grant-granular-permissions-in-a-project-permissions-template) enabled on the permission template. This permission allows you to view the Change Orders tab on the purchase order.


  * [Create a Purchase Order](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/create-a-purchase-order)


  1. Navigate to the project's **Commitments** tool.
  2. Under the **Contracts** tab, locate the purchase order or subcontract. Then click **View**.
  3. You can then view the following tabs:
     * General Tab
     * Schedule of Values Tab
     * Change Orders Tab
     * RFQs Tab
     * Invoices Tab
     * Payments Issued Tab
     * Related Items Tab
     * Emails Tab
     * Change History Tab
     * Advanced Settings Tab


##### General Tab
The **General** tab shows the following information about the purchase order:
  * **General Information.** Under General Information, you can view information about the purchase order. This information is first added when you create a purchase order. See [Create a Purchase Order](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/create-a-purchase-order).
  * **Contract Dates**. Shows the _Date Created_ and _Delivery Date_ associated with the purchase order.
  * **Additional Information**. Shows the _Payment Terms_ and _Ship Via_ method.
  * **Contract Summary Report.** In the Contract Summary Report, you can view amounts for _Original Contract_ , _Approved Change Orders_ , _Revised Contract_ , _Pending Change Orders_ , _Pending Revised Contract_ , _Draft Change Orders_ , _Invoices_ , _Payments Issued_ , _Percent Paid_ , and _Remaining Balance Outstanding_.


##### Schedule of Values Tab
This tab displays the schedule of values for the purchase order, which lists the cost codes, quantity, unit costs, subtotal, amount billed to date, and remaining costs. To learn how to update the schedule of values, see [Add a Line Item to a Commitment's Schedule of Values](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/add-a-line-item-to-a-schedule-of-values).
##### Change Orders Tab
The Change Orders tab provides an overview of any change orders that have been created for that particular purchase order. You can view the status, the amount, and due date for each change order. You can also export each change order to a PDF or CSV. See [Create a Commitment Change Order (CCO)](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/materials-user-guide-with-financials/create-a-change-order-cco).
##### RFQs Tab
If the Change Events tool is enabled on a project, the RFQs tab displays any associated Requests for Quotes (RFQs) associated. with your purchase order. To learn more, see [Create RFQs from a Change Event](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-events-project/tutorials/create-rfqs-from-a-change-event).
##### Invoices Tab
This tab displays any subcontractor invoices related to the purchase order. To learn more, see [About Subcontractor Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/about-subcontractor-invoices-legacy).
##### Payments Issued Tab
This tab displays all payments that have been issued for the purchase order. To learn more, see [Enable the Payments Issued Tab on a Commitment](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/enable-the-payments-issued-tab-on-a-commitment) and [Add a New Payment to the Payments Issued Tab of a Commitment](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/tutorials/add-a-new-payment-to-the-payments-issued-tab-of-a-commitment).
##### Related Items Tab
This tab displays all items related to the purchase order. Related items can be manually added to each purchase order. To learn how to add a related item, see [Add a Related Item to a Commitment (Legacy)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/add-a-related-item-to-a-purchase-order-or-subcontract).
##### Emails Tab
This tab displays all email communication associated with the subcontract. To learn more, see [Email a Commitment](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/email-a-purchase-order-or-subcontract).
##### Change History Tab
The Change History tab outlines changes made to the purchase order, who performed the change, details of the change, from what it was changed from and what it was changed to, and the date and time of the change. Items in this history cannot be deleted. To learn more, see [View the Change History of a Commitment](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/view-the-change-history-of-a-commitment).
##### Advanced Settings Tab
This tab allows users with the appropriate permissions to change settings on an individual purchase order or subcontract. For more information, see [Edit the Advanced Settings Tab on a Commitment](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/edit-the-advanced-settings-on-a-commitment).
##### See Also
  * [Create a Purchase Order](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/create-a-purchase-order)

title: View a Purchase Order
description: How to view the details of a purchase order using the project's Commitments tool.
